mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (userid, orderdate, shipaddr1, shipaddr2, shipcity, shipstate, shipzip, shipcountry, billaddr1, billaddr2, billcity, billstate, billzip, billcountry, courier, totalprice, billtofirstname, billtolastname, shiptofirstname, shiptolastname, creditcard, exprdate, cardtype, locale, status) VALUES (#{userid}, #{orderdate}, #{shipaddr1}, #{shipaddr2}, #{shipcity}, #{shipstate}, #{shipzip}, #{shipcountry}, #{billaddr1}, #{billaddr2}, #{billcity}, #{billstate}, #{billzip}, #{billcountry}, #{courier}, #{totalprice}, #{billtofirstname}, #{billtolastname}, #{shiptofirstname}, #{shiptolastname}, #{creditcard}, #{exprdate}, #{cardtype}, #{locale}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT o.*, l.linenum, l.itemid, l.quantity, l.unitprice FROM orders o LEFT JOIN lineitem l ON o.orderid = l.orderid WHERE o.orderid = #{orderid}
SELECT o.*, l.linenum, l.itemid, l.quantity, l.unitprice FROM orders o LEFT JOIN lineitem l ON o.orderid = l.orderid WHERE o.userid = #{userid} ORDER BY o.orderdate DESC
SELECT o.*, l.linenum, l.itemid, l.quantity, l.unitprice FROM orders o LEFT JOIN lineitem l ON o.orderid = l.orderid ORDER BY o.orderdate DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lineitem (orderid, linenum, itemid, quantity, unitprice) VALUES (#{orderid}, #{linenum}, #{itemid}, #{quantity}, #{unitprice})
mapper.select: SELECT orderid, linenum, itemid, quantity, unitprice FROM lineitem WHERE orderid = #{orderid}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orderstatus (orderid, linenum, timestamp, status) VALUES (#{orderid}, #{linenum}, #{timestamp}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET status = #{status} WHERE orderid = #{orderid}
